steps.title: Translate right
steps.content: A shift $5$ units to the right replaces $x$ with $x-5$. Thus $f(x-5)=\frac{a-17}{x-5}+6$.

steps.title: Translate down
steps.content: A shift $2$ units down subtracts $2$ from the whole function: $g(x)=f(x-5)-2$.

steps.title: Separate horizontal and vertical shifts
steps.content: The right shift changes only the input denominator from $x$ to $x-5$. The downward shift changes only the outside constant from $6$ to $4$.
